details.test: Task 1: Enroll in highest-rated qualifying productivity program
Task 2: Book up to three affordable career coaching sessions
Task 3: Create three SMART goals in health, career, and relationships
Task 4: Build weekly habit routine with multiple mindfulness/productivity habits
Task 5: Save recent short stress management articles to reading list
Task 6: Complete Life Balance assessment questions and submit
Task 7: Activate monthly subscription with 1:1 coaching under $60
Task 8: Setup 30-day confidence challenge with duration and day notes
Task 9: Bookmark imposter syndrome thread and post reply
Dashboard: Overview reflects enrolled program, sessions, goals, habits, articles, assessment, challenge, subscription, bookmarks
